{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/1609021?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dsherret/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dsherret/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dsherret/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dsherret/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/dsherret", "id": 1609021, "login": "dsherret", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjE2MDkwMjE=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dsherret/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dsherret/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dsherret/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dsherret/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dsherret/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/dsherret", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-48995", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 4.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:N/PR:N/UI:A/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N/E:U"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-353", "name": "Missing Support for Integrity Check"}], "description": "### Summary

A malicious `codeload.github.com` server can serve whatever tarball it wants and pnpm will install it regardless of the lockfile.

### Details

The lockfile does not store the hash of the dependencies from https://codeload.github.com

This means that if this server was compromised or a person's machine configuration was compromised, pnpm would download and install these dependencies.

### PoC

```sh
> pnpm -v     
10.28.2
```

Given the following package.json:

```json
{
  "dependencies": {
    "add": "git://github.com/dsherret/npm-git-dep.git#b3eeb9b"
  }
}
```

This produces a lockfile like so:

```yaml
lockfileVersion: '9.0'

settings:
  autoInstallPeers: true
  excludeLinksFromLockfile: false

importers:

  .:
    dependencies:
      add:
        specifier: git://github.com/dsherret/npm-git-dep.git#b3eeb9b
        version: https://codeload.github.com/dsherret/npm-git-dep/tar.gz/b3eeb9b

packages:

  add@https://codeload.github.com/dsherret/npm-git-dep/tar.gz/b3eeb9b:
    resolution: {tarball: https://codeload.github.com/dsherret/npm-git-dep/tar.gz/b3eeb9b}
    version: 1.0.0

snapshots:

  add@https://codeload.github.com/dsherret/npm-git-dep/tar.gz/b3eeb9b: {}
```

Notice that there is no hash. The `b3eeb9b` is not sufficient because I can configure my machine to resolve a compromised tarball from that url (I tested it out and pnpm just installs it).

### Impact

Anyone relying on github git dependencies.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00116, "percentile": 0.0188}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-hg3w-7f8c-63hp", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-26T21:49:22Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hg3w-7f8c-63hp", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-hg3w-7f8c-63hp"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-48995"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-25T18:16:38Z", "published_at": "2026-06-26T21:49:22Z", "references": ["https://github.com/pnpm/pnpm/security/advisories/GHSA-hg3w-7f8c-63hp", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-48995", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hg3w-7f8c-63hp"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/pnpm/pnpm/security-advisories/GHSA-hg3w-7f8c-63hp", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/pnpm/pnpm", "summary": "pnpm: Tarball hash of GitHub git dependencies is not stored in lockfile", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-26T21:49:26Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-hg3w-7f8c-63hp", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "10.33.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "pnpm"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 10.33.4"}, {"first_patched_version": "11.0.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "pnpm"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 11.0.0, < 11.0.7"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: pnpm: Tarball hash of GitHub git dependencies is not stored in lockfile
